summary: Comprehensive testing of Login page rewrite for Kaizer News app. All features working: language selection (English/Telugu), phone input validation (10 digits only), OTP step with 6-digit validation, back buttons, resend OTP, error handling for invalid OTP, and successful login redirect to news feed.

passed_tests: Login page loads with language selection showing BOTH English and Telugu buttons
Clicking English button navigates to phone number step with English text
Clicking Telugu button navigates to phone number step with Telugu text
Phone step shows 'Change Language' back button that returns to language selection
Phone input accepts only digits (non-digits filtered)
Phone input accepts only 10 digits (truncates longer input)
Send OTP button is disabled until 10 digits entered
Clicking Send OTP calls /api/auth/send-otp and navigates to OTP step
OTP step shows 'Change Number' back button
OTP input accepts only 6 digits
Verify & Login button disabled until 6 digits entered
Invalid OTP shows error toast 'Invalid OTP'
Verify & Login button calls /api/auth/verify-otp
Successful OTP verification redirects to news feed
Resend OTP button clears input and sends new OTP
Login page has decorative background shapes (orange theme)
Debug OTP box shows when AUTHKEY_API_KEY is not set
POST /api/auth/send-otp returns 200 with correct response structure
POST /api/auth/send-otp returns 422 without mobile field
POST /api/auth/send-otp defaults country_code to 91
POST /api/auth/verify-otp returns 404 when no OTP was sent
POST /api/auth/verify-otp returns 400 for invalid OTP
POST /api/auth/verify-otp returns 422 without otp field
Multiple OTP sends to same number work correctly
GET /api/auth/user/{phone} returns 404 for non-existent user
PUT /api/auth/user/{phone} returns 404 for non-existent user
GET /api/ health check returns 200
GET /api/news/categories returns all 10 categories

critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.jsx properly uses 3 steps: language -> phone -> otp
Phone input validation correctly filters non-digits and limits to 10 characters
OTP input validation correctly filters non-digits and limits to 6 characters
Backend OTP storage uses in-memory dict (NOTE: should use Redis in production)
OTP expiry (5 minutes) and max attempts (3) implemented correctly
User creation on first login works correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used phone number 9876543210 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page completely rewritten with 3 clear steps. All auth APIs working. Debug OTP is returned in response ONLY when AUTHKEY_API_KEY env var is empty/not set. When AUTHKEY is set, actual SMS is sent via Authkey.io API. MOCKED: YouTube video feed still uses hardcoded data. Backend OTP storage is in-memory (otp_storage dict) - consider Redis for production.
